3111470.name: Im UFO
3111470.description: Im UFO is a survival game where you fight a diverse hoard of UFO's with different abilities. You can survive or speedrun to the final UFO. In each run you collect souls that can be used to get starting upgrades. Upgrades are infinitely scalable. Each run is unique, randomized, and the final UFO has a dynamic random AI. Gameplay feel is always random, always UFO. The style is minimalistic, outer-worldly, and UFO. An infinitely varied threat, with infinitely scaling power, an experience, UFO.
3111470.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
